title: elymus trachycaulus
intro: Elymus trachycaulus, also known as slough grass or rough wheatgrass, is a type of grass native to North America and parts of Eurasia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Elymus trachycaulus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Elymus trachycaulus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
